german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Highly Accessible
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German proficiency, highlighting an imbalance in language expectations.

pm_type.title: Customer-facing PMs Lead, Core PMs Trail Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A slight gap indicates a potential imbalance in product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With 57% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates with Limited Flexibility
work_mode.subtitle: A significant majority of roles require on-site presence, with minimal remote options available.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: All job opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with no remote or unclear options available.

ai.title: AI Expertise Remains Emerging in Workforce Roles
ai.subtitle: Only 25% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities or require AI skills.

industry.title: PM demand spans multiple industries
industry.subtitle: Hiring is spread across industries with no single sector strongly dominant.
